---
title: "CV"
pagetitle: "CV | Ian Phillips"
body-class: cv-page
---

::: {.cv-download}
[Download full CV](files/cv/ian-phillips-cv.pdf)
:::

## Current position

**Bloomberg Distinguished Professor of Philosophy and Brain Sciences**  
William H. Miller III Department of Philosophy  
Department of Psychological and Brain Sciences  
Johns Hopkins University

## Selected affiliations

Associate Principal Investigator, [Perception & Mind Lab](https://perception.jhu.edu/)  
Member, [Foundations of Mind](https://mind.jhu.edu/)   
Visiting Professor in Philosophy, University of Oxford, Trinity terms

## Research areas

Philosophy of mind  
Vision science  
Perception  
Consciousness  
Memory  
Mental imagery  
Temporal experience  

## Publications

See [Papers](papers.qmd).

## Contact

See [Contact](contact.qmd).
